zachs-buffalo-wing-goodness.name: Zach's Buffalo Wing Goodness
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with cooking spray.
Mix flour, paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl.
Pat chicken wings dry with paper towels. Dip in the flour mixture until thoroughly coated. Transfer floured wings to the baking sheet; spray lightly with cooking spray.
Bake in the preheated oven, without turning, until browned, about 48 minutes. Preheat the oven's broiler. Broil wings until crisp and browned, about 5 minutes.
Combine hot wings and hot sauce in a large bowl; toss until evenly coated.

zinfandel-braised-beef-short-ribs-with-r.name: Zinfandel-braised Beef Short Ribs With Rosemary-parsnip Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy large ovenproof pot over medium-high heat. Sprinkle ribs with coarse salt and pepper. Add to pot in single layer and sauté until brown on all sides, about 10 minutes. Transfer ribs to large bowl. Add 1 tablespoon butter to pot. onions; sauté until brown, about 6 minutes. parsnips; sauté until beginning to color, about 6 minutes. Mix in garlic, then rosemary. Add wine and broth; bring to boil, scraping up browned bits.
Return ribs and any accumulated juices to pot, arranging in single layer. Bring to simmer; cover and place in oven. Braise until ribs are very tender, about 2½ hours.

Using tongs, transfer ribs to clean bowl. Spoon fat from pan juices. Boil juices until just beginning to thicken, about 10 minutes. Mix 1 tablespoon butter and flour in small bowl to smooth paste. Whisk into juices in pot; simmer until thickened enough to coat spoon, about 5 minutes longer. Season gravy with coarse salt and pepper. Return ribs to pot; spoon gravy over.
Do Ahead: Can be made 2 days ahead. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled. Rewarm over low heat before serving.
Cook potatoes and parsnips in large pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring milk, butter, and rosemary to simmer in small saucepan.
Drain potato mixture and return to pot. Stir briefly over medium heat to evaporate excess moisture. Add milk mixture and mash well. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Transfer ribs and gravy to large shallow bowl. Serve short ribs with mashed potatoes.

zucchini-and-carrot-cream-pequerecetas.name: Zucchini And Carrot Cream
instructions: He cuts and cuts his carrots, his pumpkin and his onion.
In a pot, scattering the vegetables with some olive oil till they are tender.
Cover the vegetables with water, add salt to taste and cook till they are soft. Then beat all the ingredients up to a smooth and creamy consistency.
Serve hot cream with individual ponds and join with your favorite toppings, as crutons or fresh herbs.

zucchini-carpaccio-light-and-pequereceta.name: Zucchini Carpaccio (light And )

ingredients.item: 100 g of goat cheese in small pieces
Hojas de eneldo fresco para decorar

instructions: Wash pumpkins and cut them into thin cuts using a mandolin or sharp knife.
Put pumpkin slices onto a big plate and make sure they are well spread.
Sprinkle minced nuts and pieces of goat's cheese onto pumpkins.
Roamed generously with extra virgin olive oil and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Decor with fresh dill leaves.
Let the pumpkin carpaccio rest in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes before serving, so that the flavors are mixed and the pumpkin soften slightly.

zucchini-cream-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini Cream Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg . de calabacines con la piel (bien lavados y sin las puntas)
4 tazas de de caldo de vegetales
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva

instructions: Colocar en una olla la mantequilla y el aceite de oliva, agregar el ajo y la cebolla, saltear hasta que este transparente.
Add pumpkins cut into wheels and drink with medium heat for about 4 / 5 minutes, stirring so they don't get burned.
Add the vegetable stock up to cover the pumpkins, add the peppermint and salt, let them cook till smooth.
Agregar el cilantro, rectificar la sal, retirar del fuego y dejar enfriar.
Triturar en la licuadora colocando primero los calabacines y agregando el caldo deseado hasta que tenga la textura de crema.
Calentar para servir y agregar una cucharada de nata a cada plato, decorar con perejil.
En lugar de la nata y el perejil, puede espolvorear con queso parmesano.

zucchini-feta-pesto-lasagna.name: Zucchini Feta Pesto Lasagna

ingredients.item: (72 grams) loosely packed fresh basil leaves
(24 grams) loosely packed fresh mint leaves
Or 4 medium zucchini (about 5 ounces/142 grams each)
ingredients.prep: ends trimmed, very thinly sliced lengthwise

instructions: Arrange an oven rack in the middle position. Preheat the oven to 191°C.

For the white sauce: In the bowl of a food processor fitted with the blade attachment, add the ricotta, feta, eggs, flour, salt and red pepper flakes. Puree until very smooth and creamy. With the machine running, pour in the milk and heavy cream and process until smooth. Transfer to a bowl and set aside. Clean the food processor bowl to use for the pesto.

For the pesto: Into the food processor bowl, add the basil, mint, pine nuts, garlic, lemon zest, salt and crushed red pepper flakes. Quickly blend to make a coarse paste. With the machine running, add the olive oil in a steady stream to make a smooth, bright green sauce. Remove the pesto to a bowl and set aside.
In a separate bowl, toss together the mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.

To assemble the lasagna: Spread 1 cup of white sauce in the bottom of a 9-by-13-inch baking dish. Top with a single layer of 3 lasagna noodles (see Cook’s Note). Add an even layer of zucchini (parallel to the noodles), 2 tablespoons of pesto in small dollops and one-fifth of the mozzarella cheese mixture. Repeat the process to create a second layer with 1 cup of the white sauce, now 4 noodles, zucchini, 2 tablespoons pesto and another fifth of the cheese mixture. Repeat again, but this time using 3 noodles. Repeat for a fourth layer, using 4 noodles. For the final fifth layer, top with 3 noodles and the remaining white sauce. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese mixture and top with a sprinkling of feta cheese. Tent the baking dish with foil.

Bake in the oven until bubbly and the noodles are cooked through, about 35 minutes. Uncover and bake until the sauce is thickened and the top of the lasagna is nicely browned and crusty, about 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a cooling rack for 15 to 20 minutes before cutting into individual portions. Drizzle with the remaining pesto, to serve.
The lasagna can be assembled a day ahead and refrigerated. Let return to room temperature, about 1 hour, before baking. Leftover lasagna will keep, covered, in the fridge for 2 to 3 days.

zucchini-flan-a-light-starter-pequerecet.name: Zucchini Flan, A Light Starter
zucchini-flan-a-light-starter-pequerecet.original_name: Flan de calabacín, un entrante ligero
instructions: Wash and cut pumpkins into thin slices. In a frying pan with some olive oil, scattering pumpkins with minced garlic till they are tender. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
In a big bowl, beat the eggs, add cream, parmesan cheese and mix well. Incorporates salted pumpkins into the mixture, shredds again with a hand mixer and tightens the date if necessary.
Prepare individual flan molds with butter to prevent the mixture from gluing.

It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Fold the mixture into the grease mold and place them in a deep oven plate. Fold hot water onto the plate to create a bath Mary and baker for 30-35 minutes or until the flanes are curved and firm to touch.

Let them cool their flanes a little before they crumble. Pass a knife through the edges to help let them go and then put the mold onto the serving plate. You can decorate with some ruula leaves, or some fine cuts of pumpkins, cherry tomatoes and an olive oil chorrit.
